_comment: Trigger-eval cases for skills/read-text/SKILL.md. Each case has a prompt and a reason explaining the expected routing decision.

should_fire.prompt: Read serial numbers off circuit boards in my manufacturing line
should_fire.reason: Serial number extraction from manufacturing images — core read-text use case; 'serial' keyword in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Extract the expiry date and lot number from product labels
should_fire.reason: Date code and lot number extraction from labels — 'expiry', 'lot', 'number', 'labels' in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: I need to OCR meter readings from utility meter images
should_fire.reason: Meter digit OCR — 'ocr', 'meter', 'readings' all appear in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Read license plates from parking lot camera images
should_fire.reason: License plate reading — 'license', 'plate' in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Extract text fields from scanned invoices for document digitization
should_fire.reason: Form field extraction and document digitization — 'extract', 'text', 'fields', 'document', 'digitization' in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Scan QR codes and barcodes on warehouse packages automatically
should_fire.reason: Barcode and QR code reading — 'scan', 'barcodes', 'codes' in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Pull the part number from every component image coming off the conveyor
should_fire.reason: Part number extraction from manufacturing images — 'part', 'number' in TRIGGER clause

should_fire.prompt: Recognize digits on 7-segment LED displays for meter readings
should_fire.reason: Digit recognition on meter displays — 'digit', 'meter', 'readings' in TRIGGER clause

should_not_fire.prompt: Count how many items are on the shelf right now
should_not_fire.reason: Per-instance count with no text extraction — 'count', 'items', 'shelf' route to detect-and-analyze; 'count' appears in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: Is this label correctly positioned? Flag misaligned ones
should_not_fire.reason: Image-level pass/fail verdict with no text; 'flag', 'misaligned' route to classify-or-flag; 'flag misaligned label' in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: Measure the crack width in bridge inspection photos
should_not_fire.reason: Pixel-level measurement requiring segmentation — 'crack', 'width', 'segment' keywords in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: Track pallets moving through the warehouse and alert on zone entry
should_not_fire.reason: Object tracking across frames — 'track', 'pallets' route to track-and-count; 'track pallets' in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: How much would it cost to deploy this to 10 cameras at a factory?
should_not_fire.reason: Cost/scale question with no unsolved OCR problem — 'cost', 'deploy', 'cameras' route to deployment-consultant; appears in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: Classify images as defective or pass for our quality line
should_not_fire.reason: Image-level classification pass/fail — 'classify', 'image', 'defective' route to classify-or-flag; 'classify image' in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: Tally the number of boxes on the conveyor belt per frame
should_not_fire.reason: Per-instance object count — 'tally', 'objects' route to detect-and-analyze; 'tally objects' in SKIP clause

should_not_fire.prompt: I have working OCR already — how do I wire up the integration to my backend?
should_not_fire.reason: User already has working OCR, asks only about integration — 'integration', 'ocr' keywords in SKIP clause
